DashboardPricingDocsProfileSign in

Product docs

Docs that hand your team
a fast start.

Maze is meant to be understandable by humans and executable by coding agents. Start with integration, then layer on better screen and tap coverage.

Open workspaceCompare plans
Recommended flow
Sign in to Maze
Give your coding agent MAZE_INTEGRATION.md
Watch the Maze unfold
Install the SDKInstall the SDK

Add the Maze package, initialize it at app launch, and verify ingestion succeeds before instrumenting more screens.

Track onboarding screensTrack onboarding screens

Start with welcome, authentication, verification, and KYC flows to create the most valuable behavior baseline.

Protect sensitive valuesProtect sensitive values

Mask passwords, OTP values, payment details, and any national ID fields before they leave the device.

API surfaceIntegration-ready routes

POST `/api/auth/signin`, GET/POST `/api/workspace/api-keys`, GET/PUT `/api/workspace/settings`.

Environment variablesSwap mock services without UI changes

Set `MAZE_AUTH_SERVICE_URL`, `MAZE_API_KEYS_SERVICE_URL`, `MAZE_WORKSPACE_SERVICE_URL`, and `MAZE_INTEGRATIONS_SERVICE_URL`.

Observe. Infer. Act. Product intelligence with easy integration.
